full_text:
Xue Ti (Xiaowei)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xue Ti, styledXiaowei. Held many positions in Wei, discovered Chen Jiao’s talent, famed for his honesty. Xue Ti was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
